name: Bhomesh Koli
why_notable: Original author of subfinder (2018–2019) — the Go-based passive subdomain enumeration tool that became the community standard. Subfinder's design: multiple passive source APIs queried concurrently, results deduplicated, output piped to the next tool. Co-founded ProjectDiscovery, which grew from a side project into a full open-source security tooling company (subfinder, nuclei, httpx, naabu, katana) that raised $25M+ in funding. The toolchain he helped build is now embedded in every serious recon pipeline.
